data.raceComments: {"comment":"10. THINKING OF GERTY resumes and has raced well in better metro company. She's won 3/4 fresh and finished in front in a recent Echuca jumpout. Coffey is a positive jockey engagement, and a bold run is on the cards. 5. JUST BOLTS races forward and brings a string of narrow defeats. Winning rider Nugent goes back on, and on a 9-day turnaround, she'll be tough to peg back. 13. LAMASSU resumes gelded for a top metro barn, switched from James Cummings. Won at Sale on debut and was speellled off an even effort in a Flemington Open 2. He's jumped out well, and the blinkers are on for the first time, signalling intent. Keep very safe. 8. YOLO is in the premier stable but has been struggling to post another win. Got too far back last time, but his effort at Ballarat prior ($3.9SP) would have him in the mix.","runners":[10,5,13,8],"exclusive":false}
